use_cases: User authentication and login forms for web applications
Secure credential entry with styled interactive buttons
Session management and authentication state interfaces
Multi-step verification processes with actionable buttons
ai_summary: A sign-in authentication component featuring a Radix UI Slot-based Button with CVA variants for multiple visual states. Includes 6 button variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes. Designed for credential entry with accessible focus states and shadow styling. Wraps the button in a centered card layout for clean login form presentation.
